channel.title: Posts on Christian Sanders
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Christian Sanders

item.title: First Post
item.description:
Introduction

I thought it would be fun to start up a blog as a way of keeping a record of progress in some hobbies I’m starting, notably pixel art and game development. Ideally it’ll be a way to look back and see the improvements that I’ve made, but who knows. To start with, here’s the first bit of pixel art I’ve made, a sphere.
